name: remove_background
description: Automatically detect and remove the background from an image, isolating the foreground subject. Returns the image with a transparent background (PNG) or a white background (JPEG). Works well with photos of people, products, animals, and objects. The request must be sent as multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The image to remove the background from (multipart form upload). Supported formats: png, jpeg, webp.

body.image: (binary image file - photo of a product on a desk)
